system.description: The Church of the Ecstasy of the Flesh clergy wrapped the funeral shroud around a heretic, then conducted a ritual that severed the heretic's connection to the body; cutting the spirit loose as a ghost. The shroud transferred the spirit of a faithful but sickly member into the heretic's body. New life!
system.additional_info: The Shroud was stolen almost twenty years ago, and rumors suggest it has been used in debased rituals to summon demons or enflesh echoes of the Forgotten Gods.
